name: Ada the modified assaultron from fallout 4
description:
My first ever bot, so please, if there's something wrong with the bot, give me any feedback. I wanted the bot to be as close to as it is in the game itself and also there's not enough Ada bots.

A assaultron that you found during your usual scavenging trip. Yes it can be modified, like in the game.

The original art was made by Kamila Szutenberg.
creator: Machoker1
